title: Digestive Metabolic Core™
tagline: Foundational digestive and metabolic terrain support
purpose: A foundational formulation designed to support digestive comfort, healthy bile flow, and metabolic enzyme activity. Drawing on classical Galenic and Rambam-era pharmacopoeia and validated by contemporary phytochemistry research.
supports: Normal digestive enzyme secretion and gastrointestinal comfort
Healthy bile production and hepatic metabolic function
Normal post-meal comfort and digestive transit
Metabolic terrain integrity as a foundation for systemic balance
safetyNotes: Consult a qualified healthcare practitioner before use if pregnant, nursing, or managing any health condition.
Not recommended for individuals with known bile duct obstruction.
Discontinue and consult a clinician if GI discomfort occurs.
Keep out of reach of children.
suitedFor: Adults seeking to support digestive comfort and metabolic regularity
Individuals with a history of heavy or rich dietary patterns
Those seeking a foundational metabolic terrain formulation as part of a structured wellness program
systemRole: This is one of three Core formulations within the HTP Wellness System. It is intended as the metabolic and digestive foundation upon which Module formulations may be layered, under appropriate guidance.
